column1: Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance),Epic,"h2. VPAT Accessibility Remediation — Metrc v1.17.19225
87% of all issues (252 of 288) stem from 2 root causes in shared UI components:
* *Navigation bar ARIA hierarchy* — <li> elements break the menubar > menuitem relationship (all 7 pages)
* *Kendo tabstrip ARIA structure* — role=""tablist"" on <div> instead of <ul>
A11Y-001: Fix Nav Bar ARIA Parent-Child Hierarchy,Task,"h2. A11Y-001: Fix Main Navigation Bar ARIA Parent-Child Hierarchy
*States:* All Metrc states (AK, CA, CO, DC, IL, KY, LA, ME, MD, MA, MI, MN, MS, MO, MT, NV, NJ, OH, OK, OR, RI, SD, WV)
{quote}The main navigation bar and grids that have tabs include ARIA roles that do not have the appropriate required parent/children relationships{quote}

All {{<a>}} elements with {{role=""menuitem""}} are not contained within a proper {{role=""menu""}} or {{role=""menubar""}} parent. The {{<li>}} elements break the expected ARIA parent-child relationship.
* *aria-required-parent:* 18 menuitem links per page lack valid menubar/menu parent (126 total)
* *aria-required-children:* 1 per page where menubar has invalid <li> children (7 total)
* *listitem:* 14 orphaned <li> per page (98 total, auto-resolved — see A11Y-003)
Add {{role=""none""}} to all {{<li>}} elements that are direct children of {{ul[role=""menubar""]}}.
* [ ] axe scan: 0 aria-required-parent errors on menuitem elements
* [ ] axe scan: 0 aria-required-children errors on menubar
* [ ] Keyboard: Tab navigates through all menu items
* [ ] Screen reader: Items announced as ""menuitem"" within ""menubar""

* [ ] Run axe on all 7 pages",Highest,"a11y,vpat-2026,wcag-1.3.1,a11y-vpat-ak,a11y-vpat-ca,a11y-vpat-co,a11y-vpat-dc,a11y-vpat-il,a11y-vpat-ky,a11y-vpat-la,a11y-vpat-me,a11y-vpat-md,a11y-vpat-ma,a11y-vpat-mi,a11y-vpat-mn,a11y-vpat-ms,a11y-vpat-mo,a11y-vpat-mt,a11y-vpat-nv,a11y-vpat-nj,a11y-vpat-oh,a11y-vpat-ok,a11y-vpat-or,a11y-vpat-ri,a11y-vpat-sd,a11y-vpat-wv",Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance),Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance)
A11Y-002: Fix Tabstrip ARIA Role Placement,Task,"h2. A11Y-002: Fix Kendo Tabstrip ARIA Role Placement
*States:* All Metrc states (AK, CA, CO, DC, IL, KY, LA, ME, MD, MA, MI, MN, MS, MO, MT, NV, NJ, OH, OK, OR, RI, SD, WV)
{quote}The main navigation bar and grids that have tabs include ARIA roles that do not have the appropriate required parent/children relationships{quote}
Kendo tabstrip components render with {{role=""tablist""}} on the outer {{<div>}}, but the actual tab {{<li role=""tab"">}} elements are inside a {{<ul>}} child. This creates:
* {{<div role=""tablist"">}} has invalid child {{<ul>}} (should contain tab elements directly)
* {{<li role=""tab"">}} elements don't have a direct tablist parent
Move {{role=""tablist""}} from the outer {{<div>}} to the {{<ul.k-tabstrip-items>}} element:
* [ ] axe scan: 0 aria-required-children errors on tabstrip containers
* [ ] axe scan: 0 aria-required-parent errors on tab elements
* [ ] Keyboard: Left/Right arrow keys navigate between tabs

* [ ] Screen reader: Tabs announced as ""tab 1 of N""",Highest,"a11y,vpat-2026,a11y-tree-grid-26,wcag-1.3.1,a11y-vpat-ak,a11y-vpat-ca,a11y-vpat-co,a11y-vpat-dc,a11y-vpat-il,a11y-vpat-ky,a11y-vpat-la,a11y-vpat-me,a11y-vpat-md,a11y-vpat-ma,a11y-vpat-mi,a11y-vpat-mn,a11y-vpat-ms,a11y-vpat-mo,a11y-vpat-mt,a11y-vpat-nv,a11y-vpat-nj,a11y-vpat-oh,a11y-vpat-ok,a11y-vpat-or,a11y-vpat-ri,a11y-vpat-sd,a11y-vpat-wv",Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance),Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance)
A11Y-003: List Structure Auto-Fix (Resolved by 001+002),Task,"h2. A11Y-003: Resolve Orphaned List Item Structure (Auto-Fix)
These issues are *automatically resolved* by A11Y-001 and A11Y-002. No additional code changes required.
* Navigation {{<li>}} elements (98 issues) — resolved when {{role=""none""}} applied (A11Y-001)
* Tabstrip {{<li>}} elements (4 issues) — resolved when {{role=""tablist""}} moves to {{<ul>}} (A11Y-002)
* [ ] axe scan: 0 listitem errors across all pages

* [ ] axe scan: 0 list errors across all pages",High,"a11y,vpat-2026,wcag-1.3.1,a11y-vpat-ak,a11y-vpat-ca,a11y-vpat-co,a11y-vpat-dc,a11y-vpat-il,a11y-vpat-ky,a11y-vpat-la,a11y-vpat-me,a11y-vpat-md,a11y-vpat-ma,a11y-vpat-mi,a11y-vpat-mn,a11y-vpat-ms,a11y-vpat-mo,a11y-vpat-mt,a11y-vpat-nv,a11y-vpat-nj,a11y-vpat-oh,a11y-vpat-ok,a11y-vpat-or,a11y-vpat-ri,a11y-vpat-sd,a11y-vpat-wv",Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance),Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance)
A11Y-004: Fix Grid ARIA Attribute Values,Task,"h2. A11Y-004: Fix Invalid ARIA Attribute Values on Grid Rows
{quote}Some ARIA attributes do not conform to valid values{quote}
Packages tabstrip references {{aria-activedescendant=""packages_tabstrip_ts_active""}} but this ID doesn't exist in DOM.
h3. Problem C — Treegrid attributes on non-treegrid
Financials grid uses {{aria-posinset}}, {{aria-setsize}}, {{aria-level}} on {{<tr>}} within {{role=""grid""}} (only valid for treegrid).
// Remove treegrid-only attributes from non-treegrid rows

* [ ] Screen reader correctly announces row position",Highest,"a11y,vpat-2026,a11y-tree-grid-26,wcag-4.1.2,a11y-vpat-ak,a11y-vpat-ca,a11y-vpat-co,a11y-vpat-dc,a11y-vpat-il,a11y-vpat-ky,a11y-vpat-la,a11y-vpat-me,a11y-vpat-md,a11y-vpat-ma,a11y-vpat-mi,a11y-vpat-mn,a11y-vpat-ms,a11y-vpat-mo,a11y-vpat-mt,a11y-vpat-nv,a11y-vpat-nj,a11y-vpat-oh,a11y-vpat-ok,a11y-vpat-or,a11y-vpat-ri,a11y-vpat-sd,a11y-vpat-wv",Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance),Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance)
A11Y-005: Fix Color Contrast on Finished Grid Rows,Task,"h2. A11Y-005: Fix Color Contrast on Finished Grid Rows

{quote}Pages with grids containing icons indicating their 'type' (Trade Sample icon, Product Package icon, Lab Sample Package, etc.) the icons are not meeting the color contrast ratio threshold{quote}
Text in {{.grid-finished-row}} has contrast of 2.67:1 (foreground #999999, background #f9f8f3). Required: 4.5:1 for 12px text.
Affected columns: Label, Source Harvest Names, Source Package Labels, Location Name, Item Name, Product Category, Strain, Quantity, Source Production Batch, Lab Testing State, Packaged Date.
Grid type indicator icons (Trade Sample, Product Package, Lab Sample) fail 3:1 non-text contrast.
Ensure icon fill/stroke colors meet 3:1 against #f9f8f3 background, or add visible text labels alongside icons.
* [ ] axe scan: 0 color-contrast errors on Packages page
* [ ] Manual: Finished rows visually distinct from active rows
* [ ] Manual: All grid type icons meet 3:1 contrast

* [ ] Design approval on new color values",High,"a11y,vpat-2026,a11y-tree-grid-26,wcag-1.4.3,a11y-vpat-ak,a11y-vpat-ca,a11y-vpat-co,a11y-vpat-dc,a11y-vpat-il,a11y-vpat-ky,a11y-vpat-la,a11y-vpat-me,a11y-vpat-md,a11y-vpat-ma,a11y-vpat-mi,a11y-vpat-mn,a11y-vpat-ms,a11y-vpat-mo,a11y-vpat-mt,a11y-vpat-nv,a11y-vpat-nj,a11y-vpat-oh,a11y-vpat-ok,a11y-vpat-or,a11y-vpat-ri,a11y-vpat-sd,a11y-vpat-wv",Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance),Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance)
A11Y-006: Fix Pointer Cancellation on Modal Buttons,Task,"h2. A11Y-006: Fix Pointer Cancellation on Modal Buttons
(!) *Note:* This issue was identified in VPAT but NOT flagged by axe scan. Requires manual investigation.
{quote}If a user down-clicks on a button and navigates away to up-click, the action does not perform to open the modal.{quote}
mousedown/pointerdown events trigger actions instead of click events, preventing users from aborting actions by moving pointer away before release.
# Identify all buttons that open modals (look for mousedown/pointerdown handlers)
# Test each: mouse-down on button, drag cursor off, release — action should NOT fire
# Check custom button/modal components for event binding patterns
# Review Kendo UI and Bootstrap modal event handlers
// BAD — fires on mouse-down, no cancellation possible
// GOOD — fires on click (down+up on same element)
* [ ] Manual: mousedown + drag away + mouseup — modal does NOT open
* [ ] Code audit: No mousedown/pointerdown handlers on action buttons

* [ ] Test on touch devices: touchstart + drag away should not trigger",High,"a11y,vpat-2026,wcag-2.5.2,a11y-vpat-ak,a11y-vpat-ca,a11y-vpat-co,a11y-vpat-dc,a11y-vpat-il,a11y-vpat-ky,a11y-vpat-la,a11y-vpat-me,a11y-vpat-md,a11y-vpat-ma,a11y-vpat-mi,a11y-vpat-mn,a11y-vpat-ms,a11y-vpat-mo,a11y-vpat-mt,a11y-vpat-nv,a11y-vpat-nj,a11y-vpat-oh,a11y-vpat-ok,a11y-vpat-or,a11y-vpat-ri,a11y-vpat-sd,a11y-vpat-wv",Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance),Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance)
A11Y-007: External Training Content Accessibility (Out of Scope),Task,"h2. A11Y-007: External Training Content Accessibility
The VPAT notes training videos are hosted externally. This is a content/UX issue, not a code fix. Not a same-day fix; requires product/content strategy.
* Add in-app search that includes training content results
* Provide sitemap or help index linking to training resources

* Consider embedding training videos with proper captions",Low,"a11y,vpat-2026,wcag-2.4.5,a11y-vpat-ak,a11y-vpat-ca,a11y-vpat-co,a11y-vpat-dc,a11y-vpat-il,a11y-vpat-ky,a11y-vpat-la,a11y-vpat-me,a11y-vpat-md,a11y-vpat-ma,a11y-vpat-mi,a11y-vpat-mn,a11y-vpat-ms,a11y-vpat-mo,a11y-vpat-mt,a11y-vpat-nv,a11y-vpat-nj,a11y-vpat-oh,a11y-vpat-ok,a11y-vpat-or,a11y-vpat-ri,a11y-vpat-sd,a11y-vpat-wv",Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance),Accessibility Remediation 2026 (VPAT Compliance)
